title: Every Email Has Its Own Notification / Notifications Do Not Clear
creator: phumphries
content:
Since the last update (I am running K-9 Mail v17.0 on a Moto G Stylus 5G 2023 with Android 14 Build Number U1TGNS34.42-86-4-5-4-8), I am often getting a separate notification for every new email in my In Box (POP3) instead of one notification to say that I have a bunch of new messages, and the notification(s) is(are) not going away after I look at my message(s) and delete the email(s).

Any idea if this is a bug or a feature? It is annoying to delete 10 emails and then have to delete 10 notifications about the same 10 emails.

Thanks in advance for your thoughts.
